title: Track course/workshop adoptions + learner-completion outcomes
context: The project's outcome metrics are adoption- and learning-centric: success is measured in datasets adopted and learners who complete exercises, not downloads or merges. M3 requires >= 4 datasets adopted across >= 2 programs, >= 100 learner-completions, and >= 3 verifiable external reuse events. This tracking task establishes the evidence-gathering process: committed outcomes/<dataset-id>.json artifacts for each adoption event, and a summary document that aggregates the adoption+completion metrics for the milestone review. Evidence must be externally verifiable (syllabus URL, educator confirmation, platform metric) — self-reported reuse does not count. Depends on partner-016 and pilot-008.
objective: Track, record, and commit adoption events and learner-completion outcomes for shipped datasets, producing a committed summary document meeting the M3 outcome thresholds.
acceptanceCriteria: >= 4 datasets adopted across >= 2 programs, each with a committed outcomes/<dataset-id>.json evidence artifact (syllabus/workshop URL or written educator confirmation).
>= 100 learner-completions recorded (educator-reported or platform metric); evidence is externally verifiable — not self-reported-only.
>= 3 verifiable external reuse events (citation, fork-with-use, course inclusion by a third party).
A summary document committed to the project repo aggregating all adoption events, completion counts, and reuse events, ready for milestone review.
outcomes/<dataset-id>.json files follow a consistent schema: dataset id, adopting program, platform/URL, adoption date, learner count (if known), educator contact.
Summary document committed; commit DCO signed-off.
output: A committed adoption-tracking summary document + individual outcomes/<dataset-id>.json artifacts demonstrating >= 4 adoptions, >= 100 learner-completions, and >= 3 external reuse events.
